title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IndiaPost - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at IndiaPost - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndiaPost! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Patna team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndiaPost:
IndiaPost is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaPost!
